title: 3 x Instant Nails High Strength Solvent Free Quick Grab Panel Adhesive 290ml White
features: Good early grab properties – usable in both vertical and horizontal positions

Sika Group was established in 1927 and produces and markets a wide range of state-of-the-art systems covering construction products, industrial manufacturing, automotive manufacturing and DIY products ranges
description: Instant Nails is a high strength solvent free gap filling multi use adhesive that provides a quick grab and replaces mechanical fixings in many home improvement applications.

specifications_table.Specific uses: ‎Wood, metal, PVC, most plastics, glass, aluminium, concrete, render, stone, paper, cork, ceramics plaster/plasterboard, rockwool, Pufoam board, Styrofoam, breezeblock, dado rails, architrave, skirting, wall cladding, battens, carpet gripper systems, stair nosing, aluminium or other skin panels, portable industrial buildings, caravans
